name: Bean Ragout W/Cilantro-Cornmeal Dumplings
recipeIngredient: 2 small zucchini, sliced and cut into quarters
1 15 oz. can pinto beans, rinsed & drained
1 15 oz. can black beans, rinsed & drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a Dutch oven over medium heat until hot.
2. Add onions; cook and stir about 5 minutes or until tender.
3. Add poblano, garlic, chili powder, cumin, and oregano; cook and stir about 2 minutes.
4. Add tomatoes, zucchini, red bell pepper, beans, and 1/4 teaspoon salt; bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to medium-low, and simmer, uncovered, for 5-10 minutes or until zucchini is tender.
6. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
7. To prepare dumplings, combine flour, cornmeal, baking powder, and remaining 1/4 teaspoon salt in a medium bowl; cut in shortening with pastry blender or fork until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
8. Stir in cheese and cilantro, then add milk. Blend just until dry ingredients are moistened.
9. Drop dumpling dough into 6 rounds on top of simmering ragout.
10. Cook uncovered for 5 minutes. Cover and cook for 5-10 more minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. Garnish as desired.
